data.title: Litecoin jumps 8.35% to $128.83 on technical breakout, surpassing resistance levels and entering overbought zone with robust volume.
data.description: The price of Litecoin has surged to $128.83, marking an increase of 8.35% as bullish momentum breaks through crucial resistance levels. This surge has propelled the Relative Strength Index (RSI) into overbought territory, indicating strong buying pressure. The uptrend is also supported by robust trading volume.

data.title: BCH consolidates above key moving averages, aiming for $615 resistance. It is trading at $589.40, up 1.64% in 24 hrs.
data.description: Bitcoin Cash is currently valued at $589.40, marking a 1.64% increase in the span of 24 hours. The cryptocurrency has demonstrated a consolidation trend above crucial technical support levels, indicating a positive momentum towards significant resistance levels.

data.title: Phala, a Polkadot parachain, chooses Ethereum L2 for AI and GPU compute growth, leaving its Polkadot network.
data.description: The Polkadot project Phala, which focuses on AI, is preparing to shift entirely to its Ethereum Layer 2 solution. This move is a strategic decision to leverage the Ethereum ecosystem for the expansion of confidential AI and GPU compute capabilities.

data.title: LINK price at $22.38 consolidates above 200-day MA, up 0.18%. LINK trading 28.5% above MA, eyeing $23.73 resistance breakout.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink is currently trading at $22.38, showing a slight daily increase of 0.18%. LINK is maintaining a position 28.5% higher than its 200-day moving average, indicating a potential break out above the resistance level of $23.73. This presents a bullish scenario for the digital asset.

data.title: DANA & Ant International launch Ocean Buddy initiative for marine conservation, targeting DANA's 200M users in Indonesia.
data.description: In ABU DHABI, United Arab Emirates & JAKARTA, Indonesia, DANA and Ant International, along with Konservasi International, introduced the Ocean Buddy initiative at the IUCN World Conservation Congress 2025. This initiative, tailored for DANA's 200 million users in Indonesia, aims to enhance awareness and encourage sustained engagement in marine conservation. The interactive in-app mini program is designed to foster public involvement. Ant Fores inspired the launch of this initiative.
